description: Lifecycle states for preference-to-rule verification. This is a methodology schema, not a runtime validator.
principles: No schema grounding, no deterministic execution.
No human confirmation, no candidate rule promotion.
Neural proposes; symbolic verifies and executes.

states.description: A raw user preference or fact extracted from natural language with source text preserved.
A rule-shaped object proposed from extracted slots and taxonomy.
A proposed rule whose field_id maps to a real executable source column.
A deterministic rule that has passed schema, operator, value, ambiguity, and confirmation checks.
A candidate rule promoted only after explicit user or simulated confirmation.
A verified deterministic rule or confirmed candidate rule ready for backend compilation.
An executable rule applied to a structured backend.
A returned result row with rule-level evidence and non-executed preference notes.
